You'll Learn React Eventually, So Why Not Now? — TodoList, Part 2 (11)
You'll Learn React Eventually, So Why Not Now?

Last time we built a bare-bones React TodoList. In this one we're going to polish it up — pull a chunk of the markup out into its own component, and wire up LocalStorage so your todos actually survive a page refresh. Along the way we'll run into a fun gotcha with useState being asynchronous, and figure out why useEffect is the right tool for the job (and where it isn't).
